description: Pre-seeded ARRIVAL-MNEMO memories for Phase 18 Task 2 (REST API generation). Used in Condition C only.

memories.description: REST APIs should return 422 (Unprocessable Entity) for validation errors, not 400 (Bad Request). Use 404 for missing resources, 201 for successful creation, and 204 for successful deletion with no response body.
For update (PUT/PATCH) operations with Pydantic models, use Optional[] with default values for fields that can be partially updated. This prevents requiring all fields on every update request.

Always validate pagination parameters: offset must be >= 0, limit must be >= 1 and <= max_limit. Negative offset causes list slicing bugs. Return total count alongside results for client-side pagination.

memories.rule: FastAPI uses Pydantic for automatic request validation and returns 422 with detailed error messages by default. Do not override this with manual 400 responses — leverage the built-in validation.

API test suites should use TestClient (from starlette) for synchronous testing or httpx.AsyncClient for async. Each test should be independent — create its own data rather than depending on other tests' side effects.

memories.key_insight: Search, sorting, and filtering by complex fields (like tags lists) are the most commonly under-implemented features. Ensure search is case-insensitive (use .lower()) and supports both title and description fields.
